ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade */,
  "spot_price" REAL /* Spot price at the time of the trade */,
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trader who made the trade */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell, long, short) */,
  "trade_status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., open, closed, pending) */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Product or asset type (e.g., stock, bond, forex) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forward_prices" (
  "forward_price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forward price */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade the forward price belongs to */,
  "f2m" REAL /* 2-month forward price */,
  "f1y" REAL /* 1-year forward price */,
  "f3m" REAL /* 3-month forward price */,
  "f6m" REAL /* 6-month forward price */,
  "f2y" REAL /* 2-year forward price */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the forward price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forward_price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forward_prices_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade the return belongs to */,
  "ret1yl" REAL /* 1-year return */,
  "ret3m" REAL /* 3-month return */,
  "ret6m" REAL /* 6-month return */,
  "ret2y" REAL /* 2-year return */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the return (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rolling_returns" (
  "rolling_return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rolling return */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade the rolling return belongs to */,
  "roll1y" REAL /* 1-year rolling return */,
  "roll3m" REAL /* 3-month rolling return */,
  "roll6m" REAL /* 6-month rolling return */,
  "roll2y" REAL /* 2-year rolling return */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the rolling return (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rolling_return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rolling_returns_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each strategy */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the strategy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the strategy */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level of the strategy (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "performance_metric" TEXT /* Performance metric of the strategy (e.g., return on investment, Sharpe ratio) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strategy TRADES" (
  "strategy_trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each strategy trade */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the strategy the trade belongs to */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade */,
  "entry_point" REAL /* Entry point of the trade */,
  "exit_point" REAL /* Exit point of the trade */,
  "profit_loss" REAL /* Profit or loss of the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_trade_id")
)
